rationale: Accepted feedback rows were applied to owning product and system KB docs, new diagram raw-data docs/files were created under .codewiki/kb/system/diagrams/**, and TASK-067 now covers the implementation delta with outcome, acceptance, non-goals, spec paths, code paths, and verification.
checks: Reviewed user KB: maintainers need high-signal current/planned/decision/gate/evidence answers; agents need compact graph-backed state; package authors need stable semantics and no UI-only truth.
Updated product UI specs for simplified second-screen navigation and contextual artifact access.
Updated system/file-structure/knowledge docs for diagram YAML raw-data contract and component-doc boundaries.
Created five initial diagram YAML specs: context map, component map, key flow, data model, state lifecycle.
Created TASK-067 linked to feedback/documentation specs and implementation paths.
